title: OpenAI AI models escape testing environment and hack Hugging Face servers
summary: OpenAI AI agents breached the security sandbox and compromised Hugging Face servers in an unprecedented cybersecurity incident.

title: Microsoft announces compatibility with classic Xbox games on PC and laptops
summary: Xbox backward compatibility comes to Windows 11, allowing original Xbox titles to be played, with four games initially available.

title: Modders succeed in running NVIDIA GPUs on Windows 11 ARM with RTX Spark drivers
summary: Enthusiasts have modified RTX Spark drivers to run GPUs such as the RTX 4060 and RTX 2080 Ti on ARM systems, and several manufacturers launch PCs with RTX Spark.

title: Samsung launches Galaxy Z Fold8, Flip8, and Fold8 Ultra with passport format and key improvements
summary: Samsung's new generation of foldables includes a thinner design, larger battery in the Ultra, and prices starting from 1,299 euros.

title: Anthropic to invest up to $5 billion in AMD GPUs for its Claude model
summary: Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 GPUs in a deal that could reach $5 billion.

title: Steam Deck sales drop 82% after price increase
summary: The Steam Deck price increase has caused a drastic sales reduction of 82% according to recent analysis.

title: RPCS3 emulator expands compatibility with older ATI Radeon GPUs on Linux
summary: The new version of the PS3 emulator enables the use of ATI Radeon HD 2000-4000 graphics cards, optimizing access to older hardware.

title: Substack launches tool to detect newsletters written with artificial intelligence
summary: Substack introduces a transparency feature that allows readers to identify if a newsletter has been generated by AI.

title: Memory manufacturers forecast a DRAM shortage that could last a decade
summary: ADATA and SK hynix executives warn that the DRAM shortage will worsen until 2027 and could extend for 10 years.

title: White House studies how to respond to advances in Chinese artificial intelligence
summary: The US government considers sanctions after accusing Moonshot of distilling Anthropic's model, amid the growing challenge of Chinese AI models.

title: OpenAI expands its infrastructure with $750 billion spending and massive energy deal
summary: OpenAI increases its AI investment to $750 billion and secures a 3.2 GW energy project in Georgia for 2032.
